parts.text: Ingest this meeting transcript and create tracked tasks with evidence. Transcript: Maya: Please update the onboarding email by Friday. Liam: Decision: we will keep the current approval workflow. Priya: Blocked waiting on security review.
Send this Slack update to #release: The approval workflow is done and merged.

Work dump: Action: create a local execution ledger for source records and approval requests. Please turn this into a task, update memory, and draft a GitHub PR body for the task. Do not open a live PR.
